summary: Completed comprehensive Phase 3 backend API testing for Super Apps MATSANDATAMA. All 25 Phase 3 feature test cases passed successfully (100% success rate). Tested new settings management, JWT session configuration, role-based student access, attendance/cleanliness UPSERT, schedule grid, Excel import/export, academic year semester types, and GPS validation scenarios.

notes: All Phase 3 endpoints are working correctly
Schedule validation in jurnal/validate depends on active schedule timing - this is expected behavior, not a bug
Frontend testing was not requested - BACKEND ONLY testing as specified in review request

passed_tests: GET /api/settings - returns active_days, teaching_slots, idle_timeout_minutes, session_max_hours in public response
POST /api/auth/login - returns expires_in_minutes (720 = 12h) and idle_timeout_minutes (30)
GET /api/admin/settings - returns full settings with 11 default teaching slots
PUT /api/admin/settings - admin updates active_days and teaching_slots, verified persistence
GET /api/students - admin can list all students; wali_kelas can list own class; siswa can only see self
GET /api/students?class_id=7A as walas7a - returns students of class 7A
GET /api/students?class_id=7B as walas7a - returns 403 (not their class)
POST /api/attendance/class - submit attendance with mixed status (hadir/sakit/izin/alpa), summary calculated correctly
GET /api/attendance/class/{7A_id}?date=today - retrieves the attendance just submitted
POST /api/attendance/class - DUPLICATE for same class+date UPDATES (upsert behavior confirmed)
POST /api/cleanliness/class - submit cleanliness with rating=4, condition='bersih', piket_students list
GET /api/cleanliness/class/{7A_id} - retrieves history
GET /api/schedules/grid - returns days[], slots[], grid{day:{start_time:schedule}} structure
GET /api/schedules/grid?class_id=7A - filtered by class
GET /api/schedules/grid?teacher_id=guru1 - filtered by teacher
GET /api/schedules/excel-template (admin only) - returns .xlsx file with correct Content-Type
POST /api/schedules/import-excel with valid Excel - parses and inserts 2 schedules successfully
POST /api/schedules/import-excel with INVALID Excel - returns success count + error list (1 success, 2 errors)
POST /api/academic-years with semester_type='accelerated' + semesters 1-6 - creates accelerated AY
POST /api/academic-years with semester_type='regular' + semesters ganjil/genap - creates regular AY
GET /api/schedules/my-today as guru1 - works correctly (Matematika R-7A active now)
GPS validation: gps_enabled=False with no user coords -> valid=True with reason 'GPS validation dinonaktifkan'
GPS validation: gps_enabled=True with user coords FAR -> valid=False with distance info
POST /api/jurnal/validate as guru1 with valid QR -> QR and GPS validations work correctly
Role-based access on /api/students: pure siswa role can only see self (1 student)

key_validations.attendance_upsert: CONFIRMED - same class+date updates existing record
key_validations.cleanliness_upsert: CONFIRMED - same class+date updates existing record
key_validations.gps_disabled_validation: CONFIRMED - returns valid=True with reason 'GPS validation dinonaktifkan'
key_validations.gps_enabled_far_coords: CONFIRMED - returns valid=False with distance calculation
key_validations.role_siswa_access: CONFIRMED - pure siswa role can only see self (1 student)
key_validations.role_walas_access: CONFIRMED - wali_kelas can see own class, 403 for other classes
key_validations.role_admin_access: CONFIRMED - admin can see all students
